testcase.name: Root_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002041s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.006208s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.293e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Slow_Endpoint_Completes_With_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Slow endpoint completes with 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000128s when I GET "/slow" ... Status.passed in 2.006s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 0.0001969s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Forced_Error_Endpoint_Returns_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Forced error endpoint returns 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0007279s when I GET "/error" ... Status.passed in 0.003048s then the status code should be 500 ... Status.passed in 0.0001111s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Flaky_Endpoint_Returns_200_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Flaky endpoint returns 200 or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0003109s when I GET "/flaky" ... Status.passed in 0.002326s then the status code should be one of 200, 500 ... Status.passed in 0.0001123s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Chaos_Endpoint_Returns_200,_401,_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Chaos endpoint returns 200, 401, or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000304s when I GET "/chaos" ... Status.passed in 0.002178s then the status code should be one of 200, 401, 500 ... Status.passed in 9.203e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002189s when I GET "/secure" ... Status.passed in 0.002128s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 8.392e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002382s when I GET "/admin" ... Status.passed in 0.001841s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 8.011e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Returns_200_And_A_Token
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login returns 200 and a token given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002077s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.002207s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 9.489e-05s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 8.106e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001941s given I am logged in as "alice" ... Status.passed in 0.001618s when I GET "/secure" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.001878s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.914e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001862s given I am logged in as "bob" ... Status.passed in 0.001622s when I GET "/admin" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.00131s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.294e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Submit_Accepts_Json_Payload
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Submit accepts JSON payload given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001669s when I POST to "/submit" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.00133s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.889e-05s then the JSON field "received" should be true ... Status.passed in 6.199e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_List_Is_Empty_Initially
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items list is empty initially given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001552s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.001215s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.817e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001543s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001867s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.318e-05s then the JSON field "created" should be true ... Status.passed in 6.199e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Created_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get created item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.00016s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001351s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.485e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.00353s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.007e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001411s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001244s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.39e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001177s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.507e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Deleted_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Deleted item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001459s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001117s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.413e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.00103s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.008e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.00105s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 5.198e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
